title: Fix assertions in final blocks (#7191)
body:
This simple change allows correct handling of the following case:
```verilog
module tb();
    initial begin
        $finish();
    end
    final begin
        assert(1 == 0);
    end
endmodule
```
`$finish` triggers execution of `final` block and the assertion in this final block should have effect and cause a non-zero exit code.
